bodyHtml:
✨ New

  • Splotch is now on iPhone and iPad.
  • A volume slider to fine-tune the sound.
  • Swipe between tabs in Parent Controls.

🚀 Improved

  • Smoother, crisper strokes.
  • Faster drawing and saving.

🛠 Fixed

  • The first stroke now always draws.
  • No more streaky multi-touch lines on iPhone/iPad.
  • Saving no longer creates a blank picture.
  • App updates no longer leave stale content.

✨ New

  • Lock screen rotation so your drawing stays put — on by default.
  • Tap the speaker icon to mute or unmute sounds.

🚀 Improved

  • Coloring pages now adapt to both portrait and landscape.
  • Sounds start sooner for snappier feedback.
  • Better screen-reader support for in-app messages.

🛠 Fixed

  • Your coloring page no longer resets when you rotate the device.
  • Fixed the layout on wide screens.

🚀 Improved

  • More colors now fit on smaller screens.
  • The clear button is friendlier and more fun.
  • A colorful gradient sweeps in while you're clearing the canvas.

🛠 Fixed

  • The color palette now adapts more gracefully across devices.

✨ New

  • First public release of Splotch — a quiet, ad-free drawing app made for the youngest artists.
  • Draw with big, chunky, crayon-like strokes and a row of bright, friendly colors.
  • Rainbow color picker for hundreds more colors.
  • Coloring book pages to fill in.
  • Parent Center: settings, install help, and an About page — no ads, no tracking, no accounts.
